case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARIA A SALAZAR et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 491 31ST AVENUE, #307 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.81 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A. JUDGMENT OF NOV-17-2011 SET ASIDE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $40.37 RE 30037 FOR TRANSACTION W2212131R012 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO S F H A, DOC #1904287749, WARRANT #38201362, DATED FEB-09-2012
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER FOR STAY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE A.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DANIELSON, CATHERINE SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SALAZAR, MARIE A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO  HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA A
